title: Explain the three sandbox modes in a reference doc
prompt: Write `docs/sandbox_modes.md` that documents the three `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox` modes: `:auto`, `:manual`, `:shared`. For each mode include: (1) the mode name, (2) a one-sentence summary of what it does, (3) when it is appropriate to use. The document must state that `:auto` is NOT appropriate for test isolation and that `:shared` requires `async: false`.
tier_rationale: Taxonomic explanation of documented modes. Sonnet reliably lists the three modes with correct guidance.
research_citation: "The sandbox defaults to `:auto` mode, which is essentially 'no sandboxing'." — Elixir Forum, LostKobrakai
